hero.title: outgate.ai
hero.secondary: One gateway for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and any custom provider. Deploy managed or self-hosted.

steps.title: Protect
steps.description: Guardrails scan every request for PII, credentials, and prompt injections. Block or anonymize automatically.

steps.title: Route
steps.description: Direct traffic with failover, load balancing, or AI-powered smart routing. One endpoint handles every provider.

steps.title: Monitor
steps.description: Real-time logs, latency metrics, and usage tracking across all providers. Export for compliance.

items.title: Policy Engine
items.description: Create custom policies per provider. Configure each risk category independently. Block, anonymize, or allow. Attach different policies to different providers for granular control over how sensitive content is handled.

items.title: Anonymization
items.description: Sensitive text is tokenized before reaching the provider. On the way back, tokens are automatically rehydrated (replaced with the original text) so the client receives a seamless response. The upstream never sees raw personal data or credentials, and the caller never notices the swap.

items.title: Tool Control
items.description: Allow or block specific AI tools per provider. Whitelist only the tools you approve, or blacklist dangerous ones. Prevent unauthorized function calls before they execute.

items.title: Audit & Alerts
items.description: Every policy match is logged with the detected category, matched text, and action taken. Full audit trails available for compliance reporting.

guardrail.heading: Guardrail Pipeline
guardrail.subheading: See how sensitive content is detected, anonymized, processed, and restored automatically.

routing.heading: Multi-Model Routing
routing.subheading: Multiple routing strategies. High availability, traffic distribution, intelligent model selection or layer them all.
routing.clientExamples: Claude Code, Open WebUI, Codex, API

smart.label: Smart Router
smart.description: Based on scoring criteria per model, the router evaluates every request in real time and sends it to the best match. Save cost, use the most capable models when they are really needed, and route to the most secure model when the prompt demands it.

failover.label: Failover
failover.description: Requests go to the primary upstream. If it fails or times out, the gateway automatically falls through to the next provider in priority order.

weighted.label: Load Balancer
weighted.description: Traffic is distributed across upstreams according to weight percentages. Useful for gradual rollouts, cost balancing, or A/B testing models.

combined.label: Combined
combined.description: Build composite routing by chaining routers together. Each layer operates independently — smart selection, failover, or weighted — in any combination.

free.name: Free
free.description: Get started with essential gateway features

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Full platform with self hosted regions

dashboard.title: Full Observability
dashboard.description: Complete visibility into your AI traffic. Per-provider metrics, latency breakdowns, and guardrail audit logs built in.

slides.dashboard: Outgate.ai Dashboard showing real-time AI gateway analytics
slides.metrics: Organization-wide metrics with traffic overview and latency breakdown
slides.monitoring: Smart router monitoring with upstream breakdown and guardrail metrics

useAnyLlm.title: Use Any LLM
useAnyLlm.description: Connect OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and custom providers through one gateway. Automatic model discovery, unified endpoints, and per provider rate limits.

ownYourData.title: Own Your Data
ownYourData.description: PII detection and anonymization before data reaches any provider. Response rehydration returns original content. Deploy on premise for full sovereignty.

enforcePolicies.title: Enforce Policies
enforcePolicies.description: Access policies scope API keys to specific providers. Guardrail policies block or anonymize by content category. Real time alerts on every policy violation.

integration.title: Instant Integration
integration.subtitle: Route {{tool}} through Outgate with a single command. Guardrails, logging, and cost tracking out of the box.
integration.downloadLink: Download the CLI tool to get started.

tools.title: Download CLI Tool
tools.ideSubtitle: Use {{tool}} with VS Code, Cursor, or any tool that supports API base URL override.
